forEach.description: ForEach function for terminal processing of this branch (alternative to 'to').

if.description: Predicate function reference or inline definition for the branch condition. If not specified, this is the default branch that catches all unmatched records.

to.description: Target stream reference (string) or inline stream definition for this branch's output.

BranchDefinition.description: Defines a conditional branch in a pipeline. Records matching the condition are routed to the specified destination.

code.description: Python code executed for each invocation. Has access to implicit parameters based on function type (e.g., 'key', 'value' for forEach).

expression.description: Python expression that returns the result value. Evaluated after 'code' executes.

globalCode.description: Python code executed once at initialization. Use for imports, global variables, and helper function definitions.

parameters.description: Additional parameters for the function beyond the implicit parameters from the function type.

resultType.description: The return type of the function. Examples: 'string', 'json', 'boolean', 'tuple(string, json)', 'list(tuple(json, json))'.

stores.description: List of store names this function can access. The stores become available as variables in the Python code.

type.description:
The type of function. Determines implicit parameters and expected return type.
Types: 'forEach', 'predicate', 'valueJoiner', 'generator', 'keyValueTransformer',
'keyValueToKeyValueListTransformer', 'keyValueToValueListTransformer', 'streamPartitioner',
'metadataTransformer'. Default is 'general' if not specified.

FunctionDefinition.description:
Defines a reusable function containing Python code for stream processing operations.
Functions have a type that determines their implicit parameters and expected return value.

name.description: The name of the parameter as it will be accessible in the Python code.

type.description: The type of the parameter. Examples: 'string', 'long', 'boolean', 'json'.

FunctionParameterDefinition.description: Defines an additional parameter for a function beyond the implicit parameters from the function type.

code.description: Python code executed for each invocation.

expression.description: Python expression that returns the result value.

globalCode.description: Python code executed once at initialization. Use for imports and global state initialization.

resultType.description: The return type of the function. Examples: 'string', 'long', 'boolean', 'json'.

InlineFunctionDefinition.description: Inline function definition used within pipeline steps. Contains Python code without requiring a separate named function.

OffsetResetPolicy.description: Offset reset policy when no committed offset exists for the consumer group.

as.description: Save the pipeline output under this name for linking to other pipelines. Other pipelines can use this name in their 'from' field.

branch.description: Branch definitions for conditional routing to multiple destinations. Mutually exclusive with to, forEach, and toTopicNameExtractor.

forEach.description: Terminal forEach operation. Can be a function reference (string) or inline function definition. Mutually exclusive with to, branch, and toTopicNameExtractor.

from.description: The source for this pipeline. Can be a stream/table name reference (string), an inline stream definition, or another pipeline's name.

to.description: Target stream or table reference (string) or inline definition for output. Mutually exclusive with forEach, branch, and toTopicNameExtractor.

toTopicNameExtractor.description: Dynamic topic routing configuration. Uses a function to determine the target topic for each record. Mutually exclusive with to, forEach, and branch.

via.description: List of transformation steps to apply to records. Each step has a type and type-specific configuration.

PipelineDefinition.description:
Defines a stream processing pipeline.
A pipeline consumes from a source (stream, table, or another pipeline), applies transformations,
and writes to a sink (stream, table, forEach, or branches to multiple destinations).

adder.description: Adder function for reduce operations (adds a new record to the aggregate).

advanceBy.description: Advance duration for hopping windows. Format: duration string (e.g., '5s', '1m').

aggregator.description: Aggregator function for aggregate operations. Combines the current value with the aggregated value.

duration.description: Window duration for time-based windows. Format: duration string (e.g., '20s', '5m', '1h').

forEach.description: ForEach function reference or inline definition for peek/forEach operations. Executes for each record without modifying the stream.

grace.description: Grace period duration for late-arriving records. Format: duration string (e.g., '1s', '30s').

if.description: Predicate function reference or inline definition for filter operations. Records matching the predicate pass through.

initializer.description: Initializer function for aggregate operations. Returns the initial aggregation value.

mapper.description: Mapper function reference or inline definition for transformation operations.

name.description: Optional name for this step. Useful for debugging and documentation.

otherStore.description: Store reference for the other side of a stream-stream join.

store.description: Store reference (string) or inline store definition for aggregate operations.

stream.description: Stream reference for stream-stream join operations.

subtractor.description: Subtractor function for reduce operations (removes a record from the aggregate).

table.description: Table reference for stream-table join operations.

thisStore.description: Store reference for this side of a stream-stream join.

timeDifference.description: Time difference window for stream-stream joins. Format: duration string (e.g., '1s', '5m').

valueJoiner.description: Value joiner function reference or inline definition for join operations.

windowType.description: Window type for windowByTime operations. Values: 'tumbling', 'hopping', 'sliding', 'session'.

PipelineStepDefinition.description:
Defines a single transformation step in a pipeline.
The 'type' property determines which other properties are applicable.

generator.description: Reference to the generator function that produces records. The function should return a list of key-value tuples.

interval.description: Interval between message generations. Format: duration string (e.g., '3s', '1m', '500ms').

to.description: Target stream definition. Can be a stream name reference (string) or an inline stream definition with topic, keyType, and valueType.

ProducerDefinition.description: Defines a data producer that generates records at regular intervals using a generator function.

caching.description: Whether caching is enabled for the store. Caching can improve performance but may delay downstream updates.

historyRetention.description: History retention duration for versioned stores. Format: duration string (e.g., '1h', '30m', '7d').

keyType.description: The type of the store key. Examples: 'string', 'long', 'json'.

logging.description: Whether changelog logging is enabled. When true, changes are written to a changelog topic for fault tolerance.

persistent.description: Whether the store is persistent (survives application restarts). Default depends on store type.

retainDuplicates.description: Whether to retain duplicate keys within a window. When true, all records are kept; when false, only the latest per key.

retention.description: Retention duration for window stores. Old windows are removed after this period. Format: duration string (e.g., '1h', '3s').

timestamped.description: Whether the window store records timestamps. Required for some join operations.

type.description: The type of store: 'keyValue' for simple key-value storage, 'window' for windowed state.

valueType.description: The type of the store value. Examples: 'string', 'long', 'json'.

windowSize.description: Window size duration for window stores. Format: duration string (e.g., '10m', '1h', '2s').

StoreDefinition.description: State store definition for storing local state during stream processing. Supports key-value and windowed stores.

StoreType.description: Type of state store for storing local state during stream processing.

keyType.description: The type of the message key. Examples: 'string', 'long', 'json', 'avro:SchemaName', 'protobuf:MessageName'.

offsetResetPolicy.description: The offset reset policy when no committed offset exists. Values: 'earliest' or 'latest'.

partitioner.description: Reference to a custom stream partitioner function for controlling partition assignment when producing.

timestampExtractor.description: Custom timestamp extractor for extracting event time from records.

topic.description: The Kafka topic name for this stream.

valueType.description: The type of the message value. Examples: 'string', 'json', 'avro:SchemaName', 'protobuf:MessageName', 'csv:SchemaName', 'xml:SchemaName'.

StreamDefinition.description: Defines a Kafka stream source or sink with topic, key/value types, and optional configuration.

keyType.description: The type of the message key. Examples: 'string', 'long', 'json', 'avro:SchemaName'.

topic.description: The Kafka topic name for this table. Should be a compacted topic.

valueType.description: The type of the message value. Examples: 'string', 'json', 'avro:SchemaName'.

TableDefinition.description: Defines a Kafka table backed by a compacted topic. Tables provide key-value lookup semantics where each key has exactly one current value.

code.description: Python code executed for each record to extract the timestamp. Has access to 'record' and 'previousTimestamp' variables.

expression.description: Python expression that returns the timestamp value (as a long/integer representing milliseconds since epoch).

globalCode.description: Python code executed once at initialization. Use for imports and global state initialization.

TimestampExtractorDefinition.description: Custom timestamp extractor for extracting event time from records. Allows Python code to determine the timestamp for each record.

topicNameExtractor.description: Topic name extractor function reference or inline definition. The function receives each record and returns the target topic name as a string.

TopicNameExtractorDefinition.description: Configuration for dynamic topic routing. The topic name extractor function determines the target topic for each record.

WindowType.description: Type of time window for windowed stream processing operations.

functions.description: Named function definitions. Functions contain reusable Python code for stream processing operations.

pipelines.description: Named pipeline definitions. Pipelines define the stream processing topology with sources, transformations, and sinks.

producers.description: Named producer definitions for data generation. Producers generate records at regular intervals using generator functions.

stores.description: Named state store definitions. Stores provide local state for stream processing operations.

streams.description: Named stream definitions. Each stream defines a Kafka topic with its key and value types.

tables.description: Named table definitions for compacted topics. Tables provide key-value lookup semantics.

description:
Root element for a KSML definition file.
A KSML definition describes Kafka Streams topologies using YAML and Python.
It contains sections for streams, tables, stores, functions, pipelines, and producers.
